title: Senior Doctor - B.Braun India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - B.Braun India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!
